title: Common Laboratory Normal Ranges (Adult)
content: CBC: Hemoglobin M 13.5-17.5 g/dL, F 12.0-15.5 g/dL; WBC 4.5-11.0×10³/μL; Platelets 150-400×10³/μL. Metabolic: Na 136-145 mEq/L; K 3.5-5.0 mEq/L; Creatinine M 0.7-1.3 mg/dL F 0.5-1.1 mg/dL; eGFR >60 mL/min/1.73m²; Glucose fasting 70-100 mg/dL. Liver: ALT 7-56 U/L; AST 10-40 U/L; ALP 44-147 U/L; Bilirubin total <1.2 mg/dL. Lipids: Total cholesterol <200 mg/dL; LDL-C <100 mg/dL (optimal); HDL-C M >40 F >50 mg/dL; TG <150 mg/dL. Thyroid: TSH 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; Free T4 0.8-1.8 ng/dL.
reference: CLSI EP28-A3c. 2010. WHO Laboratory Manual 5th ed.
